hero.h1: The AI Growth Engine for Real Estate Professionals
hero.subtitle: LeadSmart AI helps real estate agents and financing professionals capture, qualify, and convert leads with AI — so they can spend less time chasing and more time closing.

intro.headline_bottom: We turn them into closed deals.
intro.p1: In today's market, getting traffic is no longer the hardest part. The real challenge is converting that traffic into real conversations, qualified opportunities, and closed transactions.
intro.p2: LeadSmart AI was built to solve that problem. We combine intelligent automation, behavioral insights, and AI-powered follow-up into one system designed specifically for real estate.
intro.p3: Instead of simply storing contacts in a CRM, LeadSmart AI helps agents respond faster, prioritize smarter, and move every lead closer to a deal.

differentiator.subtitle: Traditional tools help you manage contacts. LeadSmart AI helps you create outcomes.

ai_qualification.title: Prioritize serious leads
ai_qualification.body: Identify high-intent buyers and sellers faster, so your time goes where it matters most.

instant_follow_up.title: Respond in seconds
instant_follow_up.body: AI-powered responses help you engage leads immediately, before they move on to someone else.

workflow.title: Reduce manual work
workflow.body: Automate repetitive tasks and follow-up sequences without sacrificing the personal touch.

deal_visibility.title: Track the full pipeline
deal_visibility.body: From first click to closed deal, see exactly where every lead stands and what to do next.

problem.h2: Real estate teams are losing deals in the gaps.

bullets.slow_followup: Leads go cold because follow-up is too slow
bullets.low_quality: Agents waste time on low-quality prospects
bullets.manual_workflows: Important opportunities slip through manual workflows
bullets.crm_logs_only: Most CRMs record activity, but don't drive conversion

solution.h2: LeadSmart AI closes the gaps with intelligent automation.

bullets.capture: Capture high-intent leads from inbound traffic
bullets.next_action: Surface the right next action at the right time

workflow.h2: A connected system from first click to closed deal

audience.h2: Built for modern real estate teams
audience.subtitle: LeadSmart AI is designed for professionals who need speed, visibility, and a more reliable way to convert opportunities into revenue.

cta.h2: Ready to turn more leads into closings?
cta.subtitle: Join professionals who use LeadSmart AI to respond faster, qualify smarter, and keep every deal moving.
